Package org.bloomreach.forge.discovery.site.service.discovery.search

Class QueryParamParser

java.lang.Object
org.bloomreach.forge.discovery.site.service.discovery.search.QueryParamParser
public class QueryParamParser extends Object

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static interface 
    QueryParamParser.RequestParamProvider
    Simple interface abstracting HST/servlet request parameter access so the parser can be tested without a full HST request.

  • Method Details

    • toSearchQuery

      public static SearchQuery toSearchQuery(QueryParamParser.RequestParamProvider paramProvider, DiscoverySettings settings, String brUid2, String refUrl, String url)
      Parses HTTP request parameters into a SearchQuery. Falls back to config defaults for pageSize and sort.
      Parameters:
      paramProvider - supplier of request parameter value
      settings - current channel's DiscoverySettings

    • toSearchQuery

      public static SearchQuery toSearchQuery(QueryParamParser.RequestParamProvider paramProvider, DiscoverySettings settings, int pageSizeFallback, String sortFallback, String brUid2, String refUrl, String url)
      Parses HTTP request parameters into a SearchQuery with explicit component-level fallbacks. Priority: URL param → pageSizeFallback/sortFallback → config defaults.
      Parameters:
      paramProvider - supplier of request parameter value
      settings - current channel's DiscoverySettings
      pageSizeFallback - component-configured page size; <= 0 falls through to config default
      sortFallback - component-configured sort; blank/null falls through to config default

    • toSearchQuery

      public static SearchQuery toSearchQuery(QueryParamParser.RequestParamProvider paramProvider, DiscoverySettings settings, int pageSizeFallback, String sortFallback, String catalogName, String brUid2, String refUrl, String url)

    • toCategoryQuery

      public static CategoryQuery toCategoryQuery(String categoryId, QueryParamParser.RequestParamProvider paramProvider, DiscoverySettings settings, String brUid2, String refUrl, String url)
      Parses HTTP request parameters into a CategoryQuery.
      Parameters:
      categoryId - resolved category ID (from sitemap or component param)
      paramProvider - supplier of request parameter value
      settings - current channel's DiscoverySettings
      brUid2 - value of the _br_uid_2 browser cookie
      refUrl - Referer header value (or fallback page URL)
      url - absolute URL of the current page

    • toCategoryQuery

      public static CategoryQuery toCategoryQuery(String categoryId, QueryParamParser.RequestParamProvider paramProvider, DiscoverySettings settings, int pageSizeFallback, String sortFallback, String brUid2, String refUrl, String url)
      Parses HTTP request parameters into a CategoryQuery with explicit component-level fallbacks. Priority: URL param → pageSizeFallback/sortFallback → config defaults.
      Parameters:
      categoryId - resolved category ID (from sitemap or component param)
      paramProvider - supplier of request parameter value
      settings - current channel's DiscoverySettings
      pageSizeFallback - component-configured page size; <= 0 falls through to config default
      sortFallback - component-configured sort; blank/null falls through to config default
      brUid2 - value of the _br_uid_2 browser cookie
      refUrl - Referer header value (or fallback page URL)
      url - absolute URL of the current page
